source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for infoschema_reader_test.go
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28587

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: -// this SerialSuites is used to solve the data race caused by TableStatsCacheExpiry, | tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by c_int;").Check(testkit.RowsWithSep("|", "21|silver sight", "22|gold witch", "24|gray singer")) (executor/write_test.go)
failure_signature: -// this SerialSuites is used to solve the data race caused by TableStatsCacheExpiry, | tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by c_int;").Check(testkit.RowsWithSep("|", "21|silver sight", "22|gold witch", "24|gray singer")) (executor/write_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: -// this SerialSuites is used to solve the data race caused by TableStatsCacheExpiry, | tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by c_int;").Check(testkit.RowsWithSep("|", "21|silver sight", "22|gold witch", "24|gray singer")) (executor/write_test.go)
